senses.definition: any creative piece such as paintings, sculptures, etc., that is created by an artist to convey a message or express an emotions

examples.x: The gallery featured a diverse collection of artwork from local and international artists.
She spent hours in her studio, meticulously working on her latest artwork.
The museum curator carefully curated the exhibit to showcase a range of contemporary artworks.
He admired the intricate details of the artwork, marveling at the artist's skill and creativity.
Art lovers gathered at the exhibition opening to appreciate and discuss the featured artworks.

senses.definition: an artistic expression delivered by different means of art like music or painting
the study or art of building and designing houses

examples.x: She decided to study architecture because she was fascinated by the art and science of designing buildings.
His passion for architecture began at a young age, inspired by visiting historic cathedrals and castles.
Many students choose to study architecture to learn how to design buildings that are both functional and aesthetically pleasing.
Courses in architecture cover a wide range of topics, from structural engineering to the history of design.
She was drawn to architecture because of its unique blend of creativity, technical skill, and problem-solving in the built environment.

senses.definition: the art of shaping and engraving clay, stone, etc. to create artistic objects or figures

examples.x: She studied sculpture at the art academy.
He started learning sculpture as a hobby during his free time.
The museum has a section dedicated to the history of sculpture.
The art school offers classes in painting, sculpture, and ceramics.

senses.definition: arts that are based on drawing in two dimensions with no color involved

examples.x: Graphic arts encompass a wide range of visual communication techniques, including printmaking, typography, and digital design.
The graphic arts program at the university offers courses in illustration, branding, and publication design.
Graphic arts play a crucial role in advertising, branding, and visual storytelling, influencing consumer behavior and shaping cultural narratives.
Many industries rely on graphic arts for marketing materials such as brochures, flyers, and packaging designs.

senses.definition: types of art such as dance, drama, and music that are performed in front of an audience

examples.x: The performing arts require creativity and discipline from all performers.
Many young people aspire to work in the performing arts industry.
She studied the performing arts at a prestigious university.
The theatre is a central venue for performing arts in the city.
There are several schools dedicated to training students in performing arts.

senses.definition: to add beautiful things to something in order to make it look more attractive

examples.x: During the holiday season, people decorate their homes with colorful lights, wreaths, and ornaments.
The cake decorator skillfully decorated the wedding cake with intricate designs.
The artist worked to decorate the plain wall with a vibrant mural.
The interior designer suggested using accent rugs to decorate the hardwood floors.
She decided to decorate her garden with fairy lights and flowers.

senses.definition: to make drawings according to which something will be constructed or produced

examples.x: The architect often designs modern homes with sustainable features.
They designed a prototype that revolutionized the industry.
By the time the project was due, they had already designed the entire product.
She has recently designed a series of fashion sketches.

senses.definition: to produce an elementary and quick drawing of someone or something

examples.x: She sketches a rough outline of the landscape before painting.
He sketched a quick portrait of his friend during lunch.
The artist sketches the architectural details of the building before starting the final artwork.
They sketched the scene from memory after returning from their trip.
The designer is sketching several ideas for the new logo.

senses.definition: a basic version of something, often created to outline or test ideas before the final version

examples.x: The architect presented a rough sketch of the new building before starting detailed plans.
The designer created a sketch of the dress to give the client an initial idea of the concept.
His novel began as a brief sketch, which he later expanded into a full manuscript.
They drafted a sketch of the marketing campaign to gauge the team’s reactions.
The artist’s early sketch showed the framework of what would become a detailed painting.

senses.definition: a public event at which paintings, photographs, or other things are shown

examples.x: The art museum's latest exhibition features works by contemporary artists from around the world.
She visited the photography exhibition to see the stunning black-and-white portraits.
The annual exhibition of local crafts attracts thousands of visitors each year.
The science fair included an exhibition of innovative student projects.
The gallery hosted an exhibition of vintage posters from the early 20th century.

senses.definition: designed to resemble the real thing but lacking authenticity

examples.x: The counterfeit watch was identified as fake, lacking the quality and craftsmanship of the genuine product.
The toy robot looked like a fake version of the popular brand.
They gave him a fake trophy for his performance in the competition.
The fake antique vase was carefully crafted to resemble genuine artifacts from the Ming Dynasty.
The company produced fake diamonds that were nearly indistinguishable from real ones.

senses.definition: the art of painting using the fingers rather than brushes
a border that surrounds a picture, mirror, etc.

examples.x: The antique frame around the painting added a touch of elegance to the artwork.
She chose a modern, sleek frame for her graduation photo.
The mirror's wooden frame was intricately carved with floral patterns.
They hung the family portrait in a silver frame above the fireplace.
The gallery displayed the artist's work in minimalist black frames to focus on the art itself.

senses.definition: pictures or words that are drawn on a public surface such as walls, doors, trains, etc.

examples.x: The city launched a program to clean up graffiti from buildings and public spaces to improve the neighborhood's appearance.
Some consider graffiti a form of street art, while others see it as vandalism that defaces public property.
The graffiti on the wall featured bright colors and bold designs that attracted the attention of passersby.
She admired the graffiti mural that celebrated the history and culture of the local community.
Many artists use graffiti to make social or political statements, expressing their views on walls and alleyways across the city.

senses.definition: to use pictures in a book, magazine, etc.

examples.x: She illustrates her articles with hand-drawn sketches.
He illustrates the cookbook with colorful pictures of the finished dishes.
They illustrate the travel guidebook with maps and photographs of landmarks.

senses.definition: a picture or drawing in a book, or other publication, particularly one that makes the understanding of something easier

examples.x: The illustration in the textbook helped students grasp the complex concept.
Each chapter of the novel began with a beautiful illustration.
The children’s book was filled with colorful illustrations that brought the story to life.
The manual included an illustration to show how the parts fit together.
The magazine article featured an illustration of the new technology.

senses.definition: to produce a picture or design with paint

examples.x: She painted a beautiful landscape of the countryside.
The artist painted a portrait of his wife using oil colors.
He enjoys painting abstract art, using bold colors and shapes.
The students painted murals on the classroom walls as part of a school project.
She painted a still life of fruits and flowers for the art exhibition.

senses.definition: a drawing, photograph, or painting of a person, particularly of their face and shoulders

examples.x: The artist completed a beautiful portrait of the young girl, capturing her serene expression.
He admired the portrait of his grandmother that hung in the living room.
The photographer took a stunning portrait of the couple on their wedding day.
She decided to commission a portrait of her parents for their anniversary.
The museum displayed an array of historical portraits from different eras.

senses.definition: a large object created to look like a person or animal from hard materials such as stone, metal, or wood

examples.x: The city square was adorned with a majestic statue of a heroic figure from its history.
Tourists gathered around the famous statue in the park, snapping photos to capture its beauty.
The artist spent months sculpting the intricate details of the marble statue, bringing his vision to life.
Visitors paid their respects at the solemn statue commemorating fallen soldiers in the war memorial.
The ancient civilization erected towering statues of gods and goddesses to honor their deities and assert their power.

senses.definition: a room where a painter, musician, or other artists works in

examples.x: The artist spent all day in her studio painting a new landscape.
He recorded his latest album in a professional studio.
The studio was filled with musical instruments and recording equipment.
She transformed the old room into a bright, airy studio for her art.

senses.definition: a sign or shape that represents a particular idea or organization

examples.x: The dove is a symbol of peace and tranquility, often used in artwork and literature to convey harmony.
The cross is a symbol of Christianity, representing the crucifixion and resurrection of Jesus Christ.
In ancient mythology, the owl was a symbol of wisdom and knowledge, associated with the goddess Athena.
The golden arches of McDonald's serve as a symbol of the fast-food chain, instantly recognizable worldwide.

senses.definition: someone who has become very skillful in their chosen art, particularly one in the past

examples.x: The renowned painter was considered a master of impressionism, with his works displayed in galleries around the world.
As a master of classical music, the conductor led the orchestra with precision and grace.
The sushi chef, a true master of his craft, delicately prepared each roll with skill and finesse.
The martial arts instructor was hailed as a master of karate, teaching students the discipline and techniques of the ancient art form.
The celebrated novelist was recognized as a master storyteller, captivating readers with his vivid imagination and compelling narratives.

senses.definition: a specific way of writing, designing, painting, etc. that is typical of a certain era, person, movement, place, etc.

examples.x: Japanese calligraphy is celebrated for its elegant style and intricate characters, reflecting the country's rich cultural heritage.
The Renaissance style is characterized by its emphasis on realism, symmetry, and classical motifs.
The Bauhaus style of design is known for its minimalist aesthetic and focus on functionality.

senses.definition: the art of making pictures by sticking photographs, pieces of cloth or colored paper onto a surface

examples.x: She created a vibrant collage of city scenes using magazine cutouts and acrylic paint.
The kindergarten class made collages with glitter, feathers, and recycled materials.
His collage combined old family photographs with handwritten letters for a nostalgic effect.
The artist's abstract collage featured torn paper and bold strokes of paint.
The gallery showcased collages depicting nature scenes made from pressed flowers and leaves.

senses.definition: art forms such as painting, drawing, sculpting, etc. that people can look at, in contrast to music and literature

examples.x: The gallery showcased a variety of visual arts from contemporary artists.
Visual arts play a vital role in expressing societal issues.
She has always been drawn to visual arts like painting and sculpture.
He believes that visual arts are a powerful tool for communication.
The school offers a specialized course in visual arts and design.
